Short CV

He was born in Kars in 1956. He completed Mechanical engineering master and doctorate in Yıldız Technical University. He started working in Suleyman Demirel University in 1979. He worked as a lecturer in Yıldız Technical University between 1980-1992 years. Until 2010, he worked in various positions in private sector.

Between 2010-2014, he was tasked with Okan University Occupational Safety Program Coordinatorship, Associate Program Presidency and Work Place Medicine, and Occupational Health Course Director. He has tasked with Uskudar University Occupational Health and Safety Program Coordinatorship and USGUMER Presedency. He has Workplace Medicine and Occupational Health Trainer Certificate, A class Occupational Safety Expertise Certificate. He has a book about Occupational Health and Safety, many articles in refereed journals and many papers at several symposiums.
